overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi survival horror game. The player character explores a dark, industrial medical facility with shifting emergency lighting (teal and red), moving through circular rooms and narrow corridors. The character transitions from crouching to walking while navigating the atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular medical bay with central equipment

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular platform, observing the central medical equipment

entered.detail: raised circular metal platform with red accent lighting along the edge
large cylindrical medical machine or storage unit in the center of the room
cool teal-green ambient lighting illuminating the facility

segments.scene_description: The character explores a circular medical bay with teal ambient lighting, walking around a central cylindrical structure. The environment features metallic flooring and walls with a futuristic industrial design.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow maintenance corridor with red floor lighting

events.description: character crouches down and begins moving carefully along the wall

agents.ego_description: crouching low and moving carefully along the corridor wall toward a door

entered.detail: smooth metallic wall paneling with horizontal lines
red accent lights embedded in the floor along the path
metal door with small rectangular window showing light beyond
illuminated red sign reading LOCKER above a doorway

segments.scene_description: The character crouches and moves carefully along a narrow corridor wall with red floor lighting. The camera follows closely as the character approaches a door marked with a red LOCKER sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: radiotherapy department corridor with emergency lighting

events.description: lighting shifts to intense red emergency lighting throughout the corridor
character approaches the radiotherapy room with glass walls and red signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the red-lit corridor, approaching the radiotherapy room and security door

entered.detail: glass-walled medical room with red RADIOTHERAPY signage
intense red emergency lights illuminating walls and ceiling
large reinforced metal door with circular locking mechanism
illuminated signs pointing to SURGERY and other departments
electronic access panel beside the security door

segments.scene_description: Intense red emergency lighting illuminates a corridor featuring a radiotherapy room with glass walls. The character walks toward a heavy security door at the end of the hallway, then turns around.

events.description: character turns around and walks back away from the security door

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back through the circular room toward a different corridor

entered.detail: returning to the circular platform area now under red lighting
previously unseen corridor entrance leading to a different section
doorway emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character returns through the circular medical bay, now bathed in red light, and heads toward a different corridor entrance. The central cylindrical structure remains visible as the character navigates the space.

events.description: lighting shifts from red to warm yellow as character enters new corridor
character enters long corridor with windows and teal lighting

agents.ego_description: entering a new corridor with yellow lighting, then proceeding into a long hallway with windows

entered.detail: small transitional space with warm yellow wall lights
rectangular amber light fixtures on the walls
extended straight hallway with metallic walls and ceiling
wall with horizontal slatted windows showing another room
door marked with 01 and L17 signage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a transitional space with warm yellow lighting before moving into a long corridor with teal ambient light and windows along the right wall. Numbered doors mark the left side of the hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile medical facility as the lighting shifts from cool teal to alarming red and finally to a warm, structured corridor. It begins with the character navigating a circular medical bay around a central cylindrical structure under teal ambient light, before transitioning into a narrow corridor where the character crouches along a wall illuminated by red floor lighting. As the character approaches a locker sign and passes a glass-walled radiotherapy room, the environment becomes saturated in intense red emergency lighting, leading the camera toward a heavy security door before it pivots back. The scene then returns through the now red-lit circular bay and passes through a transitional space of warm yellow light, finally opening into a long teal corridor lined with numbered doors and windows.
